message:
feat: single global daemon with module caching (Docker-style)

Refactor daemon architecture from per-module to single global daemon:

- One daemon at /tmp/edgebox.sock handles all modules
- Module cache: HashMap of path -> (module, CoW snapshot)
- First run loads module + creates CoW snapshot
- Subsequent runs use cached module (instant)

Protocol changes:
- Client sends: path_len (4 bytes) + path + newline
- Warmup command: "WARM" + path_len + path + newline

New command:
  edgebox warmup <file.aot>  # Pre-load without running

Performance (loop.aot):
- Cold start (daemon + load): ~500ms
- Warm (cached): ~40ms
- Different module in same daemon: loads on demand

Also increases benchmark timeout to 5min for fib(45)x10.
